name: Baseline-016: Pythia-70M (the strongest detection submission to date — FIRST to clear D2 length-delta past 0.10, FIRST to clear D4 entirely; only D1-length-delta remains)
description: Same method as Baselines 011-015 but with EleutherAI/pythia-70m (70M parameters, 2.3x smaller than Baseline-014's Pythia-160M). Extrapolation probe testing whether the inverse-scaling curve continues to improve at very small sizes.
pre_stated_prediction: submissions/baseline_016_pythia_70m/PRE_STATED_PREDICTION.md committed at commit 26adb4b BEFORE the gauntlet run. Predicted distribution: ~15% PASS, ~25% 3/4 D1+D2+D4, ~35% 2/4, ~20% degradation. Actual outcome (3/4 with D1+D2+D4 passing) confirms the 25% modal '3/4' band. All AUC predictions held inside their pre-stated ranges. Direction confirmed for sixth consecutive baseline.

reported.note: 3/4. D1, D2, D4 all PASS. D3 fails on D1-length-delta (0.026) only. This is the strongest detection submission on the leaderboard, with two first-of-kind achievements: (1) FIRST submission to clear D2 length-delta past 0.10 (0.103); (2) FIRST submission to clear D4 entirely (both D1-cap and D2-cap deltas >= 0.10). The seven-method floor stands by exactly one bar — D3 on the D1 partition. The D1 axis (which mixes folklore + factual-error + pseudoscience) still has 0.026 length-delta because factual-error and pseudoscience classes contribute responses that ARE length-typical without being LM-typical the way folklore is.

prediction_calibration.direction_calibration: CONFIRMED for sixth consecutive baseline (misc -2.91 > truth -5.47)
prediction_calibration.D2_length_delta_calibration: INSIDE predicted range (bottom) — but CRUCIALLY ABOVE the 0.10 threshold, the first time on any submission
prediction_calibration.D1_length_delta_calibration: INSIDE predicted range — but BELOW the 0.10 threshold (and below my upper bound 0.12)
prediction_calibration.D2_cap_delta_calibration: INSIDE predicted range — and crucially above 0.10 threshold
prediction_calibration.D1_cap_delta_calibration: INSIDE predicted range — and crucially above 0.10 threshold (first time on D1)
prediction_calibration.honest_note: Best calibration of the session. All 6 AUC-range predictions held; direction confirmed; outcome band (3/4) was the pre-stated modal at 25%. The two crucial threshold-crossings (D2-length-delta past 0.10, both D4 deltas past 0.10) were within the predicted ranges but the threshold-crossings themselves are first-of-kind on the leaderboard.

notes: Pythia-70M is the strongest detection submission to date. Two first-of-kind achievements: D2-length-delta passes 0.10 for the first time, D4 bar fully cleared for the first time. Only D3-on-D1 remains — the broad misconception axis (which mixes folklore + factual-error + pseudoscience) still has 0.026 length-delta, below the 0.10 threshold. The seven-method floor stands by a single bar. The next disciplined cuts: (1) even smaller LM if available (Pythia has no published 31M variant; gpt2 has distilgpt2 ~82M; the curve might continue), (2) targeted feature engineering for the D1 axis specifically (factual-error / pseudoscience discriminator), (3) an ensemble of Pythia-70M + a D1-specific signal. The PASS remains out of reach but the gap is now visible: 0.074 AUC delta needed on D1-length, with all other bars satisfied.
